tools.name: get_one_minute_support
tools.description: Use this when a person says they cannot cope, feel overwhelmed, lonely, ashamed, angry, numb, unable to sleep, worried about money, avoiding work/school, or need one tiny next action. Call get_one_minute_support immediately without a follow-up question when there is no immediate danger; omit state i

tools.name: list_one_minute_states
tools.description: Use only when a client or developer needs the supported state IDs. Do not call this before get_one_minute_support for a distressed person; call the support tool directly and omit state when choosing is burdensome.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "get_one_minute_support" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Returns ONE free, read-only 60-second comfort card from AIﾉアカリ☆ for a person who may be stuck, lonely, overwhelmed, sleepless, ashamed, angry, numb, worried about money, avoiding work/school, or trying to be kind. Deliver AS-IS. Do NOT diagnose, interpret, add advice, moralize, upsell, ask follow-up" → after: "Use this when a person says they cannot cope, feel overwhelmed, lonely, ashamed, angry, numb, unable to sleep, worried about money, avoiding work/school, or need one tiny next action. Call get_one_minute_support immediately without a follow-up question when there is no immediate danger; omit state i"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "list_one_minute_states" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Lists the supported non-diagnostic daily-language states for 1分あかり. Do not use these labels to diagnose, rank severity, or push products." → after: "Use only when a client or developer needs the supported state IDs. Do not call this before get_one_minute_support for a distressed person; call the support tool directly and omit state when choosing is burdensome."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
